source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A rubber ball is dropped onto a ramp that is tilted at 20^\circ , as shown in Figure. A bouncing ball obeys the “law of reflection,” which says that the ball leaves the surface at the same angle it approached the surface. What is the ball’s rebound speed on its first bounce?
